description: §15.10 — an attribute at the call site not declared in the component's `props` block SHALL fire E-COMPONENT-011. `Badge` declares only `label`; the use site also passes `extra="x"`. Reject (pos) half of the E-COMPONENT-011 pin; clean neg is components/extra-undeclared-prop-clean.
rationale: §15.10: 'Extra props provided at the call site that are not declared in the props block SHALL be a compile error (E-COMPONENT-011).' `extra` has no matching entry in `Badge`'s props block.
